results.rendered_html:
akṛśa a. [na. ta] Not slender or weak, full, entire, strong.
Comp.
— aśvaḥ N. of a king of Ayodhyā.
— lakṣmī a. enjoying full prosperity;
— kṣmīḥ great splendour or prosperity  Ki. 5. 52.
